summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ManoProtect Alert Subscription System. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend AlertSubscription component working correctly. Users can subscribe to fraud alerts, receive confirmation, and the system properly handles duplicate subscriptions.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test subscriptions during testing (prefixed with test_alert_, test_noname_, test_frontend_, test_flow_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alert subscription system is fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/alerts/subscribe (creates subscription), POST /api/alerts/unsubscribe (requires email + token), GET /api/alerts/subscriptions/count (public stat), POST /api/alerts/broadcast (sends alerts to all subscribers), GET /api/alerts/history (returns broadcast history). Frontend AlertSubscription component is on landing page with data-testid attributes for testing.

subscribe_endpoint.details: POST /api/alerts/subscribe creates new subscription with sub_XXXX ID, handles already_subscribed case, validates email format

unsubscribe_endpoint.details: POST /api/alerts/unsubscribe requires valid email + token combination, returns 404 for invalid token

broadcast_endpoint.details: POST /api/alerts/broadcast sends alerts to all active subscribers, supports alto/medio/bajo risk levels

history_endpoint.details: GET /api/alerts/history returns broadcast history with limit parameter support

frontend_subscription_form.details: AlertSubscription component on landing page with name (optional) and email fields, shows success state after subscription

mocked_apis.sendgrid_email: SendGrid may send real emails if API key is valid, otherwise logs to console in mock mode
